name: 90/90 Stretch
description: Sit on the floor with one leg in front of you bent at 90 degrees (shin roughly parallel to your chest) and the other leg behind you also bent at 90 degrees. Your front shin and back shin should both be flat on the ground. Sit tall, then lean your torso forward over the front shin to deepen the stretch. Hold, then switch sides. Excellent for hip internal and external rotation.
